documentation.description:
Handshake message to initiate, control and stop image streaming when using
the Image Transmission Protocol:
https://mavlink.io/en/services/image_transmission.html.

record_types.name: Data_Transmission_Handshake

fields.name: Size
fields.description:
Units: [bytes]
total data size (set on ACK only).

fields.name: Width
fields.description: Width of a matrix or image.

fields.name: Height
fields.description: Height of a matrix or image.

fields.name: Packets
fields.description: Number of packets being sent (set on ACK only).

fields.name: Payload
fields.description:
Units: [bytes]
Payload size per packet (normally 253 byte, see DATA field size in
message ENCAPSULATED_DATA) (set on ACK only).

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Encode

documentation.description: Put the message in the buffer ready for send
